zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard VI de Comminges於1224年出生在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛培吉利韓時，他的父親Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges29歲，母親Cécile de Foix24歲。他於1245年8月26日與Thérèse d’Astarac在法國米迪-列內斯格斯蒙吉達亞斯塔拉可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年3月20日在法國米迪-列內斯格斯薩馬坦享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard VI de Comminges于1224年出生在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛培吉利韓时，他的父亲Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges29岁，母亲Cécile de Foix24岁。他于1245年8月26日与Thérèse d’Astarac在法国米迪-列內斯格斯蒙吉達亞斯塔拉可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年3月20日在法国米迪-列內斯格斯薩馬坦享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comminges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard VI de Comminges was born in 1224, in Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, his father, Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges, was 29 and his mother, Cécile de Foix, was 24. He married Thérèse d’Astarac on 26 August 1245, in Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 March 1295, in Samatan, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard VI de Comminges est né en 1224, à Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, son père, Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cécile de Foix, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Thérèse d’Astarac le 26 août 1245, à Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1295, à Samatan, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard VI de Comminges 1224 in Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges 29 und seine Mutter Cécile de Foix 24. Er hat am 26. August 1245 in Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich Thérèse d’Astarac geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1295 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Samatan, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard VI de Comminges è nato il nel 1224 nel Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Cécile de Foix, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Thérèse d’Astarac il 26 agosto 1245, nel Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1295, nel Samatan, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard VI de Commingesが1224年にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオンプeグイルハンで生まれた時，父Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Commingesは29歳，母Cécile de Foixは24歳であった。1245年8月26日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスジャーズモント-ド'アスターアックでThérèse d’Astaracと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年3月20日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスジャーズサマタンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard VI de Comminges(이)가 1224년 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 pe길핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cécile de Foix(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1245년 8월 26일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 그르스 몽-드'아스타라크에서 Thérèse d’Astarac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 3월 20일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 그르스 샘앳아에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard VI de Comminges nasceu em 1224, em Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Cécile de Foix, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Thérèse d’Astarac em 26 de agosto de 1245, em Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1295, em Samatan, Gers, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard VI de Comminges родился в 1224 г. в местности пeгуилхань, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cécile de Foix, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Thérèse d’Astarac 26 августа 1245 г. в местности монт-д'астарак, джирс, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1295 г. в местности сэматань, джирс, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard VI de Comminges nació en 1224, en Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Cécile de Foix, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Thérèse d’Astarac el 26 de agosto de 1245, en Mont-d'Astarac, Gers, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1295, en Samatan, Gers, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
